params.prompt: Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club, minimal luxury editorial style. Course title: HERMES AGENT. Subtitle: Multi-Agent AI Masterclass. Palette: deep black, graphite, silver white, tiny electric blue accents. Very high negative space, elegant serif title, modern sans body, subtle thin borders and crop marks. Text: LIMITLESS CLUB at top; HERMES AGENT as large central headline; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; three small refined chips: Chief of Staff Agent / Content Agent / Vibe Coding Agent; bottom CTA: สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; footer: By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Visual: no large robot, only abstract chrome AI orb / agent network diagram. Extremely clean, premium, mobile readable, no clutter, no extra logos, no misspelled duplicate text.
